word: G2598 - καταβάλλω - katabállō - kat-ab-al'-lo - Cast down

sections.paragraph:
- Original: καταβάλλω

- Transliteration: Kataballo

- Phonetic: kat-ab-al'-lo

- Definition:

1. to cast down

a. to throw to the ground, prostate

2. to put in a lower place

a. to lay (down) a foundation

- Origin: from G2596 and G906

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G2596 and G906; to throw down: - cast down lay.
